title: leptosiphon bolanderi
intro: Leptosiphon bolanderi, also known as Bolander's linanthus, is a flowering plant species in the phlox family (Polemoniaceae) native to California. It is used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and pneumonia. Leptosiphon bolanderi can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in some herbal remedies in the form of tinctures and salves.
